DEMURRER
Off Calendar Feb-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
RESPONDENT EDDIE STEVENSON''S DEMURRER PETITION TO REVOKE WILL is Off calendar for this department. Moving party should re-notice the motion to be heard in Department 204. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Demurrer Of Executor Eddie Stevenson To Petition To Revoke Will Filed Herein By Frances Jackson
Off Calendar Feb-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Triay for Eddie Stevenson (Executor/Moving Party). Vernon Goins for Frances Jackson (Petitioner).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court the tentative ruling as follows: The demurrer is sustained without leave to amend.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Revoke A Will
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Continued To Feb-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Revoke A Will
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Continued To Jan-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vernon Goins for Frances Jackson (Petitioner).

Mr. Goins requested a 60-day continuance stating that the Parties are engaging in meaningful settlement negotiations. The Petition to Revoke A Will was continued to January 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
